summary: Make 'plan advance' idempotent per UTC day via a last_advanced field so a retried call cannot skip a reading range.
reason: The generated advance always added a full PerDay and recorded no completion date; a retry after a timeout (user or MCP client) silently advanced twice, moving 'plan today' past unread verses.
validated_outcome: Two 'plan advance' calls on the same day leave completed_verses unchanged (208 -> 208); the second reports 'already recorded today's reading'.
